priority.when: First tool to use when starting analysis
priority.why: Understand project structure and identify directories to analyze
Get full context of code for comprehensive analysis

priority.when: Need to find specific patterns or code across repository
priority.why: Identify code smells, security issues, or patterns systematically

priority.when: Running ESLint or other analysis tools
priority.why: Execute external analysis tools for comprehensive checking

tool.name: list_files
tool.purpose: List files and directories in a specific path
tool.when_to_use: - At the start of analysis to understand project structure - Before processing each directory to get file list - To identify which directories to traverse

parameter.name: path
parameter.description: Directory path to list (relative to workspace)
